---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "needs-triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces if available.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Windows 11 WSL2 |
| Docker version | `docker --version` |
| Node.js version | `node --version` |
| Browser (if UI bug) | e.g. Chrome 124 |
| `saas-starter-selfhosted` version / commit | e.g. `v1.0.0` or commit SHA |

## Relevant Logs

```
Paste any relevant log output here (docker compose logs, browser console, etc.)
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or files here.
